2292            }
2293            break;
2294
2295        case 13:
2296            if (!strcmp(var, "DOCUMENT_ROOT")) {
2297                result = ap_document_root(r);
2298            }
2299            break;
2300
2301        case 14:
2302            if (*var == 'H' && !strcmp(var, "HTTP_FORWARDED")) {
2303                result = lookup_header("Forwarded", ctx);
2304            }
2305            else if (*var == 'C' && !strcmp(var, "CONTEXT_PREFIX")) {
2306                result = ap_context_prefix(r);
2307            }
2308            else if (var[8] == 'M' && !strcmp(var, "REQUEST_METHOD")) {
2309                result = r->method;
2310            }
2311            else if (!strcmp(var, "REQUEST_SCHEME")) {
2312                result = ap_http_scheme(r);
2313            }
2314            break;
2315
2316        case 15:
2317            switch (var[7]) {
2318            case 'E':
2319                if (!strcmp(var, "HTTP_USER_AGENT")) {
2320                    result = lookup_header("User-Agent", ctx);
2321                }
2322                break;
2323
2324            case 'F':
2325                if (!strcmp(var, "SCRIPT_FILENAME")) {
2326                    result = r->filename; /* same as request_filename (16) */ view japanese
2327                }
2328                break;
2329
2330            case 'P':
2331                if (!strcmp(var, "SERVER_PROTOCOL")) {
2332                    result = r->protocol;
2333                }
2334                break;
2335
2336            case 'S':
2337                if (!strcmp(var, "SERVER_SOFTWARE")) {
2338                    result = ap_get_server_banner();
2339                }
2340                break;
2341            }
2342            break;
2343
2344        case 16:
2345            if (*var == 'C' && !strcmp(var, "CONN_REMOTE_ADDR")) {
2346                result = r->connection->client_ip;
2347            }
2348            else if (!strcmp(var, "REQUEST_FILENAME")) {
2349                result = r->filename; /* same as script_filename (15) */ view japanese
2350            }
2351            break;
2352
2353        case 21:
2354            if (!strcmp(var, "HTTP_PROXY_CONNECTION")) {
2355                result = lookup_header("Proxy-Connection", ctx);
2356            }
2357            else if (!strcmp(var, "CONTEXT_DOCUMENT_ROOT")) {
2358                result = ap_context_document_root(r);
2359            }
2360            break;
2361        }
2362    }
2363
2364    return apr_pstrdup(r->pool, result ? result : "");
2365}
2366
2367
2368/*
2369 * +-------------------------------------------------------+
2370 * |                                                       |
2371 * |                 Expansion functions
2372 * |                                                       |
2373 * +-------------------------------------------------------+
2374 */ view japanese
2375
2376/*
2377 * Bracketed expression handling
2378 * s points after the opening bracket
2379 */ view japanese
2380static APR_INLINE char *find_closing_curly(char *s)
2381{
2382    unsigned depth;
2383
2384    for (depth = 1; *s; ++s) {
2385        if (*s == RIGHT_CURLY && --depth == 0) {
2386            return s;
2387        }
2388        else if (*s == LEFT_CURLY) {
2389            ++depth;
2390        }
2391    }
2392
2393    return NULL;
2394}
2395
2396static APR_INLINE char *find_char_in_curlies(char *s, int c)
2397{
2398    unsigned depth;
2399
2400    for (depth = 1; *s; ++s) {
2401        if (*s == c && depth == 1) {
2402            return s;
2403        }
2404        else if (*s == RIGHT_CURLY && --depth == 0) {
2405            return NULL;
2406        }
2407        else if (*s == LEFT_CURLY) {
2408            ++depth;
2409        }
2410    }
2411
2412    return NULL;
2413}
2414
2415/* perform all the expansions on the input string
2416 * putting the result into a new string
2417 *
2418 * for security reasons this expansion must be performed in a
2419 * single pass, otherwise an attacker can arrange for the result
2420 * of an earlier expansion to include expansion specifiers that
2421 * are interpreted by a later expansion, producing results that
2422 * were not intended by the administrator.
2423 *
2424 * unsafe_qmark if not NULL will be set to 1 or 0 if a question mark
2425 * is found respectively in a literal or in a lookup/expansion (whether
2426 * it's the first or last qmark depends on [QSL]). Should be initialized
2427 * to -1 and remains so if no qmark is found.
2428 */ view japanese
2429static char *do_expand(char *input, rewrite_ctx *ctx, rewriterule_entry *entry,
2430                       int *unsafe_qmark)
2431{
2432#define EXPAND_SPECIALS "\\$%"
2433    result_list *result, *current;
2434    result_list sresult[SMALL_EXPANSION];
2435    unsigned spc = 0;
2436    apr_size_t span, inputlen, outlen;
2437    char *p, *c;
2438    apr_pool_t *pool = ctx->r->pool;
2439
2440    inputlen = strlen(input);
2441    if (!unsafe_qmark) {
2442        span = strcspn(input, EXPAND_SPECIALS);
2443    }
2444    else {
2445        span = strcspn(input, EXPAND_SPECIALS "?");
2446        if (input[span] == '?') {
2447            /* this qmark is not from an expansion thus safe */
2448            *unsafe_qmark = 0;
2449
2450            /* keep tracking only if interested in the last qmark */
2451            if (!entry || !(entry->flags & RULEFLAG_QSLAST)) {
2452                unsafe_qmark = NULL;
2453            }
2454
2455            /* find the next real special char, any (last) qmark up to
2456             * there is safe too
2457             */ view japanese
2458            span += strcspn(input + span, EXPAND_SPECIALS);
2459        }
2460    }
2461
2462    /* fast path (no specials) */ view japanese
2463    if (span >= inputlen) {
2464        return apr_pstrmemdup(pool, input, inputlen);
2465    }
2466
2467    /* well, actually something to do */ view japanese
2468    result = current = &(sresult[spc++]);
2469
2470    p = input + span;
2471    current->next = NULL;
2472    current->string = input;
2473    current->len = span;
2474    outlen = span;
2475
2476    /* loop for specials */ view japanese
2477    do {
2478        int expanded = 0;
2479
2480        /* prepare next entry */ view japanese
2481        if (current->len) {
2482            current->next = (spc < SMALL_EXPANSION)
2483                            ? &(sresult[spc++])
2484                            : (result_list *)apr_palloc(pool,
2485                                                        sizeof(result_list));
2486            current = current->next;
2487            current->next = NULL;
2488            current->len = 0;
2489        }
2490
2491        /* escaped character */ view japanese
2492        if (*p == '\\') {
2493            current->len = 1;
2494            ++outlen;
2495            if (!p[1]) {
2496                current->string = p;
2497                break;
2498            }
2499            else {
2500                current->string = ++p;
2501                ++p;
2502            }
2503        }
2504
2505        /* variable or map lookup */ view japanese
2506        else if (p[1] == '{') {
2507            char *endp;
2508
2509            endp = find_closing_curly(p+2);
2510            if (!endp) {
2511                current->len = 2;
2512                current->string = p;
2513                outlen += 2;
2514                p += 2;
2515            }
2516
2517            /* variable lookup */ view japanese
2518            else if (*p == '%') {
2519                p = lookup_variable(apr_pstrmemdup(pool, p+2, endp-p-2), ctx);
2520
2521                span = strlen(p);
2522                current->len = span;
2523                current->string = p;
2524                outlen += span;
2525
2526                expanded = 1;
2527                p = endp + 1;
2528            }
2529
2530            /* map lookup */ view japanese
2531            else {     /* *p == '$' */ view japanese
2532                char *key;
2533
2534                /*
2535                 * To make rewrite maps useful, the lookup key and
2536                 * default values must be expanded, so we make
2537                 * recursive calls to do the work. For security
2538                 * reasons we must never expand a string that includes
2539                 * verbatim data from the network. The recursion here
2540                 * isn't a problem because the result of expansion is
2541                 * only passed to lookup_map() so it cannot be
2542                 * re-expanded, only re-looked-up. Another way of
2543                 * looking at it is that the recursion is entirely
2544                 * driven by the syntax of the nested curly brackets.
2545                 */ view japanese
2546
2547                key = find_char_in_curlies(p+2, ':');
2548                if (!key) {
2549                    current->len = 2;
2550                    current->string = p;
2551                    outlen += 2;
2552                    p += 2;
2553                }
2554                else {
2555                    char *map, *dflt;
2556
2557                    map = apr_pstrmemdup(pool, p+2, endp-p-2);
2558                    key = map + (key-p-2);
2559                    *key++ = '\0';
2560                    dflt = find_char_in_curlies(key, '|');
2561                    if (dflt) {
2562                        *dflt++ = '\0';
2563                    }
2564
2565                    /* reuse of key variable as result */ view japanese
2566                    key = lookup_map(ctx->r, map, do_expand(key, ctx, entry, NULL));
2567                    if (!key && dflt && *dflt) {
2568                        key = do_expand(dflt, ctx, entry, NULL);
2569                    }
2570                    if (key && *key) {
2571                        span = strlen(key);
2572                        current->len = span;
2573                        current->string = key;
2574                        outlen += span;
2575                    }
2576
2577                    expanded = 1;
2578                    p = endp + 1;
2579                }
2580            }
2581        }
2582
2583        /* backreference */ view japanese
2584        else if (apr_isdigit(p[1])) {
2585            int n = p[1] - '0';
2586            backrefinfo *bri = (*p == '$') ? &ctx->briRR : &ctx->briRC;
2587
2588            /* see ap_pregsub() in server/util.c */ view japanese
2589            if (bri->source && n < AP_MAX_REG_MATCH
2590                && bri->regmatch[n].rm_eo > bri->regmatch[n].rm_so) {
2591                span = bri->regmatch[n].rm_eo - bri->regmatch[n].rm_so;
2592                if (entry && (entry->flags & RULEFLAG_ESCAPEBACKREF)) {
2593                    /* escape the backreference */ view japanese
2594                    char *tmp2, *tmp;
2595                    tmp = apr_pstrmemdup(pool, bri->source + bri->regmatch[n].rm_so, span);
2596                    tmp2 = escape_backref(pool, tmp, entry->escapes, entry->noescapes,
2597                                          entry->flags);
2598                    rewritelog(ctx->r, 5, ctx->perdir, "escaping backreference '%s' to '%s'",
2599                            tmp, tmp2);
2600
2601                    current->len = span = strlen(tmp2);
2602                    current->string = tmp2;
2603                } else {
2604                    current->len = span;
2605                    current->string = bri->source + bri->regmatch[n].rm_so;
2606                }
2607                outlen += span;
2608
2609                expanded = 1;
2610            }
2611
2612            p += 2;
2613        }
2614
2615        /* not for us, just copy it */ view japanese
2616        else {
2617            current->len = 1;
2618            current->string = p++;
2619            ++outlen;
2620        }
2621
2622        if (unsafe_qmark && expanded && current->len
2623            && memchr(current->string, '?', current->len)) {
2624            /* this qmark is from an expansion thus unsafe */ view japanese
2625            *unsafe_qmark = 1;
2626
2627            /* keep tracking only if interested in the last qmark */
2628            if (!entry || !(entry->flags & RULEFLAG_QSLAST)) {
2629                unsafe_qmark = NULL;
2630            }
2631        }
2632
2633        /* check the remainder */ view japanese
2634        if (!unsafe_qmark) {
2635            span = strcspn(p, EXPAND_SPECIALS);
2636        }
2637        else {
2638            span = strcspn(p, EXPAND_SPECIALS "?");
2639            if (p[span] == '?') {
2640                /* this qmark is not from an expansion thus safe */ view japanese
2641                *unsafe_qmark = 0;
2642
2643                /* keep tracking only if interested in the last qmark */ view japanese
2644                if (!entry || !(entry->flags & RULEFLAG_QSLAST)) {
2645                    unsafe_qmark = NULL;
2646                }
2647
2648                /* find the next real special char, any (last) qmark up to
2649                 * there is safe too
2650                 */ view japanese
2651                span += strcspn(p + span, EXPAND_SPECIALS);
2652            }
2653        }
2654        if (span > 0) {
2655            if (current->len) {
2656                current->next = (spc < SMALL_EXPANSION)
2657                                ? &(sresult[spc++])
2658                                : (result_list *)apr_palloc(pool,
2659                                                           sizeof(result_list));
2660                current = current->next;
2661                current->next = NULL;
2662            }
2663
2664            current->len = span;
2665            current->string = p;
2666            p += span;
2667            outlen += span;
2668        }
2669
2670    } while (p < input+inputlen);
2671
2672    /* assemble result */ view japanese
2673    c = p = apr_palloc(pool, outlen + 1); /* don't forget the \0 */ view japanese
2674    do {
2675        if (result->len) {
2676            ap_assert(c+result->len <= p+outlen); /* XXX: can be removed after
2677                                                   * extensive testing and
2678                                                   * review
2679                                                   */ view japanese
2680            memcpy(c, result->string, result->len);
2681            c += result->len;
2682        }
2683        result = result->next;
2684    } while (result);
2685
2686    p[outlen] = '\0';
2687
2688    return p;
2689}
2690
2691/*
2692 * perform all the expansions on the environment variables
2693 */ view japanese
2694static void do_expand_env(data_item *env, rewrite_ctx *ctx)
2695{
2696    char *name, *val;
2697
2698    while (env) {
2699        name = do_expand(env->data, ctx, NULL, NULL);
2700        if (*name == '!') {
2701            name++;
2702            apr_table_unset(ctx->r->subprocess_env, name);
2703            rewritelog(ctx->r, 5, NULL, "unsetting env variable '%s'", name);
2704        }
2705        else {
2706            if ((val = ap_strchr(name, ':')) != NULL) {
2707                *val++ = '\0';
2708            } else {
2709                val = "";
2710            }
2711
2712            apr_table_set(ctx->r->subprocess_env, name, val);
2713            rewritelog(ctx->r, 5, NULL, "setting env variable '%s' to '%s'",
2714                        name, val);
2715        }
2716
2717        env = env->next;
2718    }
2719
2720    return;
2721}
2722
2723/*
2724 * perform all the expansions on the cookies
2725 *
2726 * TODO: use cached time similar to how logging does it
2727 */ view japanese
2728static void add_cookie(request_rec *r, char *s)
2729{
2730    char *var;
2731    char *val;
2732    char *domain;
2733    char *expires;
2734    char *path;
2735    char *secure;
2736    char *httponly;
2737    char *samesite;
2738
2739    char *tok_cntx;
2740    char *cookie;
2741    /* long-standing default, but can't use ':' in a cookie */ view japanese
2742    const char *sep = ":"; 
2743
2744    /* opt-in to ; separator if first character is a ; */ view japanese
2745    if (s && *s == ';') { 
2746        sep = ";"; 
2747        s++;
2748    }
2749
2750    var = apr_strtok(s, sep, &tok_cntx);
2751    val = apr_strtok(NULL, sep, &tok_cntx);
2752    domain = apr_strtok(NULL, sep, &tok_cntx);
2753
2754    if (var && val && domain) {
2755        request_rec *rmain = r;
2756        char *notename;
2757        void *data;
2758
2759        while (rmain->main) {
2760            rmain = rmain->main;
2761        }
2762
2763        notename = apr_pstrcat(rmain->pool, var, "_rewrite", NULL);
2764        apr_pool_userdata_get(&data, notename, rmain->pool);
2765        if (!data) {
2766            char *exp_time = NULL;
2767
2768            expires = apr_strtok(NULL, sep, &tok_cntx);
2769            path = expires ? apr_strtok(NULL, sep, &tok_cntx) : NULL;
2770            secure = path ? apr_strtok(NULL, sep, &tok_cntx) : NULL;
2771            httponly = secure ? apr_strtok(NULL, sep, &tok_cntx) : NULL;
2772            samesite = httponly ? apr_strtok(NULL, sep, &tok_cntx) : NULL;
2773
2774            if (expires) {
2775                apr_time_exp_t tms;
2776                long exp_min;
2777
2778                exp_min = atol(expires);
2779                if (exp_min) {
2780                    apr_time_exp_gmt(&tms, r->request_time
2781                                     + apr_time_from_sec((60 * exp_min)));
2782                    exp_time = apr_psprintf(r->pool, "%s, %.2d-%s-%.4d "
2783                                                     "%.2d:%.2d:%.2d GMT",
2784                                           apr_day_snames[tms.tm_wday],
2785                                           tms.tm_mday,
2786                                           apr_month_snames[tms.tm_mon],
2787                                           tms.tm_year+1900,
2788                                           tms.tm_hour, tms.tm_min, tms.tm_sec);
2789                }
2790            }
2791
2792            cookie = apr_pstrcat(rmain->pool,
2793                                 var, "=", val,
2794                                 "; path=", path ? path : "/",
2795                                 "; domain=", domain,
2796                                 expires ? (exp_time ? "; expires=" : "")
2797                                 : NULL,
2798                                 expires ? (exp_time ? exp_time : "")
2799                                 : NULL,
2800                                 (secure && (!ap_cstr_casecmp(secure, "true")
2801                                             || !strcmp(secure, "1")
2802                                             || !ap_cstr_casecmp(secure,
2803                                                            "secure"))) ?
2804                                  "; secure" : NULL,
2805                                 (httponly && (!ap_cstr_casecmp(httponly, "true")
2806                                               || !strcmp(httponly, "1")
2807                                               || !ap_cstr_casecmp(httponly,
2808                                                              "HttpOnly"))) ?
2809                                  "; HttpOnly" : NULL,
2810                                 NULL);
2811
2812            if (samesite && strcmp(samesite, "0") && ap_cstr_casecmp(samesite,"false")) { 
2813                cookie = apr_pstrcat(rmain->pool, cookie, "; SameSite=", 
2814                                     samesite, NULL);
2815            }
2816
2817            apr_table_addn(rmain->err_headers_out, "Set-Cookie", cookie);
2818            apr_pool_userdata_set("set", notename, NULL, rmain->pool);
2819            rewritelog(rmain, 5, NULL, "setting cookie '%s'", cookie);
2820        }
2821        else {
2822            rewritelog(rmain, 5, NULL, "skipping already set cookie '%s'",
2823                        var);
2824        }
2825    }
2826
2827    return;
2828}
2829
2830static void do_expand_cookie(data_item *cookie, rewrite_ctx *ctx)
2831{
2832    while (cookie) {
2833        add_cookie(ctx->r, do_expand(cookie->data, ctx, NULL, NULL));
2834        cookie = cookie->next;
2835    }
2836
2837    return;
2838}
2839
2840#if APR_HAS_USER
2841/*
2842 * Expand tilde-paths (/~user) through Unix /etc/passwd
2843 * database information (or other OS-specific database)
2844 */ view japanese
2845static char *expand_tildepaths(request_rec *r, char *uri)
2846{
2847    if (uri && *uri == '/' && uri[1] == '~') {
2848        char *p, *user;
2849
2850        p = user = uri + 2;
2851        while (*p && *p != '/') {
2852            ++p;
2853        }
2854
2855        if (p > user) {
2856            char *homedir;
2857
2858            user = apr_pstrmemdup(r->pool, user, p-user);
2859            if (apr_uid_homepath_get(&homedir, user, r->pool) == APR_SUCCESS) {
2860                if (*p) {
2861                    /* reuse of user variable */ view japanese
2862                    user = homedir + strlen(homedir) - 1;
2863                    if (user >= homedir && *user == '/') {
2864                        *user = '\0';
2865                    }
2866
2867                    return apr_pstrcat(r->pool, homedir, p, NULL);
2868                }
2869                else {
2870                    return homedir;
2871                }
2872            }
2873        }
2874    }
2875
2876    return uri;
2877}
2878#endif  /* if APR_HAS_USER */ view japanese
2879
2880
2881/*
2882 * +-------------------------------------------------------+
2883 * |                                                       |
2884 * |              rewriting lockfile support
2885 * |                                                       |
2886 * +-------------------------------------------------------+
2887 */ view japanese
2888
2889static apr_status_t rewritelock_create(server_rec *s, apr_pool_t *p)
2890{
2891    apr_status_t rc;
2892
2893    /* create the lockfile */ view japanese
2894    rc = ap_global_mutex_create(&rewrite_mapr_lock_acquire, NULL,
2895                                rewritemap_mutex_type, NULL, s, p, 0);
2896    if (rc != APR_SUCCESS) {
2897        return rc;
2898    }
2899
2900    return APR_SUCCESS;
2901}
2902
2903static apr_status_t rewritelock_remove(void *data)
2904{
2905    /* destroy the rewritelock */ view japanese
2906    if (rewrite_mapr_lock_acquire) {
2907        apr_global_mutex_destroy(rewrite_mapr_lock_acquire);
2908        rewrite_mapr_lock_acquire = NULL;
2909    }
2910    return APR_SUCCESS;
2911}
2912
2913
2914/*
2915 * +-------------------------------------------------------+
2916 * |                                                       |
2917 * |           configuration directive handling
2918 * |                                                       |
2919 * +-------------------------------------------------------+
2920 */ view japanese
2921
2922/*
2923 * own command line parser for RewriteRule and RewriteCond,
2924 * which doesn't have the '\\' problem.
2925 * (returns true on error)
2926 *
2927 * XXX: what an inclined parser. Seems we have to leave it so
2928 *      for backwards compat. *sigh*
2929 */ view japanese
2930static int parseargline(char *str, char **a1, char **a2, char **a2_end, char **a3)
2931{
2932    char quote;
2933
2934    while (apr_isspace(*str)) {
2935        ++str;
2936    }
2937
2938    /*
2939     * determine first argument
2940     */ view japanese
2941    quote = (*str == '"' || *str == '\'') ? *str++ : '\0';
2942    *a1 = str;
2943
2944    for (; *str; ++str) {
2945        if ((apr_isspace(*str) && !quote) || (*str == quote)) {
2946            break;
2947        }
2948        if (*str == '\\' && apr_isspace(str[1])) {
2949            ++str;
2950            continue;
2951        }
2952    }
2953
2954    if (!*str) {
2955        return 1;
2956    }
2957    *str++ = '\0';
2958
2959    while (apr_isspace(*str)) {
2960        ++str;
2961    }
2962
2963    /*
2964     * determine second argument
2965     */ view japanese
2966    quote = (*str == '"' || *str == '\'') ? *str++ : '\0';
2967    *a2 = str;
2968
2969    for (; *str; ++str) {
2970        if ((apr_isspace(*str) && !quote) || (*str == quote)) {
2971            break;
2972        }
2973        if (*str == '\\' && apr_isspace(str[1])) {
2974            ++str;
2975            continue;
2976        }
2977    }
2978
2979    if (!*str) {
2980        *a3 = NULL; /* 3rd argument is optional */ view japanese
2981        *a2_end = str;
2982        return 0;
2983    }
2984    *a2_end = str;
2985    *str++ = '\0';
2986
2987    while (apr_isspace(*str)) {
2988        ++str;
2989    }
2990
2991    if (!*str) {
2992        *a3 = NULL; /* 3rd argument is still optional */ view japanese
2993        return 0;
2994    }
2995
2996    /*
2997     * determine third argument
2998     */ view japanese
2999    quote = (*str == '"' || *str == '\'') ? *str++ : '\0';
3000    *a3 = str;
3001    for (; *str; ++str) {
3002        if ((apr_isspace(*str) && !quote) || (*str == quote)) {
3003            break;
3004        }
3005        if (*str == '\\' && apr_isspace(str[1])) {
3006            ++str;
3007            continue;
3008        }
3009    }
3010    *str = '\0';
3011
3012    return 0;
3013}
3014
3015static void *config_server_create(apr_pool_t *p, server_rec *s)
3016{
3017    rewrite_server_conf *a;
3018
3019    a = (rewrite_server_conf *)apr_pcalloc(p, sizeof(rewrite_server_conf));
3020
3021    a->state           = ENGINE_DISABLED;
3022    a->options         = OPTION_NONE;
3023    a->rewritemaps     = apr_hash_make(p);
3024    a->rewriteconds    = apr_array_make(p, 2, sizeof(rewritecond_entry));
3025    a->rewriterules    = apr_array_make(p, 2, sizeof(rewriterule_entry));
3026    a->server          = s;
3027
3028    return (void *)a;
3029}
3030
3031static void *config_server_merge(apr_pool_t *p, void *basev, void *overridesv)
3032{
3033    rewrite_server_conf *a, *base, *overrides;
3034
3035    a         = (rewrite_server_conf *)apr_pcalloc(p,
3036                                                   sizeof(rewrite_server_conf));
3037    base      = (rewrite_server_conf *)basev;
3038    overrides = (rewrite_server_conf *)overridesv;
3039
3040    a->state = (overrides->state_set == 0) ? base->state : overrides->state;
3041    a->state_set = overrides->state_set || base->state_set;
3042    a->options = (overrides->options_set == 0) ? base->options : overrides->options;
3043    a->options_set = overrides->options_set || base->options_set;
3044
3045    a->server  = overrides->server;
3046
3047    if (a->options & OPTION_INHERIT ||
3048            (base->options & OPTION_INHERIT_DOWN &&
3049             !(a->options & OPTION_IGNORE_INHERIT))) {
3050        /*
3051         *  local directives override
3052         *  and anything else is inherited
3053         */ view japanese
3054        a->rewritemaps     = apr_hash_overlay(p, overrides->rewritemaps,
3055                                              base->rewritemaps);
3056        a->rewriteconds    = apr_array_append(p, overrides->rewriteconds,
3057                                              base->rewriteconds);
3058        a->rewriterules    = apr_array_append(p, overrides->rewriterules,
3059                                              base->rewriterules);
3060    }
3061    else if (a->options & OPTION_INHERIT_BEFORE || 
3062            (base->options & OPTION_INHERIT_DOWN_BEFORE &&
3063             !(a->options & OPTION_IGNORE_INHERIT))) {
3064        /*
3065         *  local directives override
3066         *  and anything else is inherited (preserving order)
3067         */ view japanese
3068        a->rewritemaps     = apr_hash_overlay(p, base->rewritemaps,
3069                                              overrides->rewritemaps);
3070        a->rewriteconds    = apr_array_append(p, base->rewriteconds,
3071                                              overrides->rewriteconds);
3072        a->rewriterules    = apr_array_append(p, base->rewriterules,
3073                                              overrides->rewriterules);
3074    }
3075    else {
3076        /*
3077         *  local directives override
3078         *  and anything else gets defaults
3079         */ view japanese
3080        a->rewritemaps     = overrides->rewritemaps;
3081        a->rewriteconds    = overrides->rewriteconds;
3082        a->rewriterules    = overrides->rewriterules;
3083    }
3084
3085    return (void *)a;
3086}
3087
3088static void *config_perdir_create(apr_pool_t *p, char *path)
3089{
3090    rewrite_perdir_conf *a;
3091
3092    a = (rewrite_perdir_conf *)apr_pcalloc(p, sizeof(rewrite_perdir_conf));
3093
3094    a->state           = ENGINE_DISABLED;
3095    a->options         = OPTION_NONE;
3096    a->baseurl         = NULL;
3097    a->rewriteconds    = apr_array_make(p, 2, sizeof(rewritecond_entry));
3098    a->rewriterules    = apr_array_make(p, 2, sizeof(rewriterule_entry));
3099
3100    if (path == NULL) {
3101        a->directory = NULL;
3102    }
3103    else {
3104        /* make sure it has a trailing slash */ view japanese
3105        if (path[strlen(path)-1] == '/') {
3106            a->directory = apr_pstrdup(p, path);
3107        }
3108        else {
3109            a->directory = apr_pstrcat(p, path, "/", NULL);
3110        }
3111    }
3112
3113    return (void *)a;
3114}
3115
3116static void *config_perdir_merge(apr_pool_t *p, void *basev, void *overridesv)
3117{
3118    rewrite_perdir_conf *a, *base, *overrides;
3119
3120    a         = (rewrite_perdir_conf *)apr_pcalloc(p,
3121                                                  sizeof(rewrite_perdir_conf));
3122    base      = (rewrite_perdir_conf *)basev;
3123    overrides = (rewrite_perdir_conf *)overridesv;
3124
3125    a->state = (overrides->state_set == 0) ? base->state : overrides->state;
3126    a->state_set = overrides->state_set || base->state_set;
3127    a->options = (overrides->options_set == 0) ? base->options : overrides->options;
3128    a->options_set = overrides->options_set || base->options_set;
3129
3130    if (a->options & OPTION_MERGEBASE) { 
3131        a->baseurl = (overrides->baseurl_set == 0) ? base->baseurl : overrides->baseurl;
3132        a->baseurl_set = overrides->baseurl_set || base->baseurl_set;
3133    }
3134    else { 
3135        a->baseurl = overrides->baseurl;
3136    }
3137
3138    a->directory  = overrides->directory;
3139
3140    if (a->options & OPTION_INHERIT ||
3141            (base->options & OPTION_INHERIT_DOWN &&
3142             !(a->options & OPTION_IGNORE_INHERIT))) {
3143        a->rewriteconds = apr_array_append(p, overrides->rewriteconds,
3144                                           base->rewriteconds);
3145        a->rewriterules = apr_array_append(p, overrides->rewriterules,
3146                                           base->rewriterules);
3147    }
3148    else if (a->options & OPTION_INHERIT_BEFORE || 
3149            (base->options & OPTION_INHERIT_DOWN_BEFORE &&
3150             !(a->options & OPTION_IGNORE_INHERIT))) {
3151        a->rewriteconds    = apr_array_append(p, base->rewriteconds,
3152                                              overrides->rewriteconds);
3153        a->rewriterules    = apr_array_append(p, base->rewriterules,
3154                                              overrides->rewriterules);
3155    }
3156    else {
3157        a->rewriteconds = overrides->rewriteconds;
3158        a->rewriterules = overrides->rewriterules;
3159    }
3160
3161    return (void *)a;
3162}
3163
3164static const char *cmd_rewriteengine(cmd_parms *cmd,
3165                                     void *in_dconf, int flag)
3166{
3167    rewrite_perdir_conf *dconf = in_dconf;
3168    rewrite_server_conf *sconf;
3169
3170    sconf = ap_get_module_config(cmd->server->module_config, &rewrite_module);
3171
3172    /* server command? set both global scope and base directory scope */
3173    if (cmd->path == NULL) {
3174        sconf->state = (flag ? ENGINE_ENABLED : ENGINE_DISABLED);
3175        sconf->state_set = 1;
3176        dconf->state = sconf->state;
3177        dconf->state_set = 1;
3178    }
3179    /* directory command? set directory scope only */
3180    else {
3181        dconf->state = (flag ? ENGINE_ENABLED : ENGINE_DISABLED);
3182        dconf->state_set = 1;
3183    }
3184
3185    return NULL;
3186}
3187
3188static const char *cmd_rewriteoptions(cmd_parms *cmd,
3189                                      void *in_dconf, const char *option)
3190{
3191    int options = 0;
3192
3193    while (*option) {
3194        char *w = ap_getword_conf(cmd->temp_pool, &option);
3195
3196        if (!strcasecmp(w, "inherit")) {
3197            options |= OPTION_INHERIT;
3198        }
3199        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "inheritbefore")) {
3200            options |= OPTION_INHERIT_BEFORE;
3201        }
3202        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "inheritdown")) {
3203            options |= OPTION_INHERIT_DOWN;
3204        }
3205        else if(!strcasecmp(w, "inheritdownbefore")) {
3206            options |= OPTION_INHERIT_DOWN_BEFORE;
3207        }
3208        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "ignoreinherit")) {
3209            options |= OPTION_IGNORE_INHERIT;
3210        }
3211        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "allownoslash")) {
3212            options |= OPTION_NOSLASH;
3213        }
3214        else if (!strncasecmp(w, "MaxRedirects=", 13)) {
3215            ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_WARNING, 0, cmd->server, APLOGNO(00664)
3216                         "RewriteOptions: MaxRedirects option has been "
3217                         "removed in favor of the global "
3218                         "LimitInternalRecursion directive and will be "
3219                         "ignored.");
3220        }
3221        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "allowanyuri")) {
3222            options |= OPTION_ANYURI;
3223        }
3224        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "mergebase")) {
3225            options |= OPTION_MERGEBASE;
3226        }
3227        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "ignorecontextinfo")) {
3228            options |= OPTION_IGNORE_CONTEXT_INFO;
3229        }
3230        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "legacyprefixdocroot")) {
3231            options |= OPTION_LEGACY_PREFIX_DOCROOT;
3232        }
3233        else if (!strcasecmp(w, "UnsafePrefixStat")) {
3234            options |= OPTION_UNSAFE_PREFIX_STAT;
3235        }
3236        else {
3237            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteOptions: unknown option '",
3238                               w, "'", NULL);
3239        }
3240    }
3241
3242    /* server command? set both global scope and base directory scope */ view japanese
3243    if (cmd->path == NULL) { /* is server command */
3244        rewrite_perdir_conf *dconf = in_dconf;
3245        rewrite_server_conf *sconf =
3246            ap_get_module_config(cmd->server->module_config,
3247                                 &rewrite_module);
3248
3249        sconf->options |= options;
3250        sconf->options_set = 1;
3251        dconf->options |= options;
3252        dconf->options_set = 1;
3253    }
3254    /* directory command? set directory scope only */ view japanese
3255    else {                  /* is per-directory command */
3256        rewrite_perdir_conf *dconf = in_dconf;
3257
3258        dconf->options |= options;
3259        dconf->options_set = 1;
3260    }
3261
3262    return NULL;
3263}
3264
3265static const char *cmd_rewritemap(cmd_parms *cmd, void *dconf, const char *a1,
3266                                  const char *a2, const char *a3)
3267{
3268    rewrite_server_conf *sconf;
3269    rewritemap_entry *newmap;
3270    apr_finfo_t st;
3271    const char *fname;
3272
3273    sconf = ap_get_module_config(cmd->server->module_config, &rewrite_module);
3274
3275    newmap = apr_pcalloc(cmd->pool, sizeof(rewritemap_entry));
3276
3277    if (strncasecmp(a2, "txt:", 4) == 0) {
3278        if ((fname = ap_server_root_relative(cmd->pool, a2+4)) == NULL) {
3279            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteMap: bad path to txt map: ",
3280                               a2+4, NULL);
3281        }
3282
3283        newmap->type      = MAPTYPE_TXT;
3284        newmap->datafile  = fname;
3285        newmap->checkfile = fname;
3286        newmap->cachename = apr_psprintf(cmd->pool, "%pp:%s",
3287                                         (void *)cmd->server, a1);
3288    }
3289    else if (strncasecmp(a2, "rnd:", 4) == 0) {
3290        if ((fname = ap_server_root_relative(cmd->pool, a2+4)) == NULL) {
3291            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteMap: bad path to rnd map: ",
3292                               a2+4, NULL);
3293        }
3294
3295        newmap->type      = MAPTYPE_RND;
3296        newmap->datafile  = fname;
3297        newmap->checkfile = fname;
3298        newmap->cachename = apr_psprintf(cmd->pool, "%pp:%s",
3299                                         (void *)cmd->server, a1);
3300    }
3301    else if (strncasecmp(a2, "dbm", 3) == 0) {
3302        apr_status_t rv;
3303
3304        newmap->type = MAPTYPE_DBM;
3305        fname = NULL;
3306        newmap->cachename = apr_psprintf(cmd->pool, "%pp:%s",
3307                                         (void *)cmd->server, a1);
3308
3309        if (a2[3] == ':') {
3310            newmap->dbmtype = "default";
3311            fname = a2+4;
3312        }
3313        else if (a2[3] == '=') {
3314            const char *colon = ap_strchr_c(a2 + 4, ':');
3315
3316            if (colon) {
3317                newmap->dbmtype = apr_pstrndup(cmd->pool, a2 + 4,
3318                                               colon - (a2 + 3) - 1);
3319                fname = colon + 1;
3320            }
3321        }
3322
3323        if (!fname) {
3324            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteMap: bad map:",
3325                               a2, NULL);
3326        }
3327
3328        if ((newmap->datafile = ap_server_root_relative(cmd->pool,
3329                                                        fname)) == NULL) {
3330            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteMap: bad path to dbm map: ",
3331                               fname, NULL);
3332        }
3333
3334        rv = apr_dbm_get_usednames_ex(cmd->pool, newmap->dbmtype,
3335                                      newmap->datafile, &newmap->checkfile,
3336                                      &newmap->checkfile2);
3337        if (rv != APR_SUCCESS) {
3338            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteMap: dbm type ",
3339                               newmap->dbmtype, " is invalid", NULL);
3340        }
3341    }
3342    else if ((strncasecmp(a2, "dbd:", 4) == 0)
3343             || (strncasecmp(a2, "fastdbd:", 8) == 0)) {
3344        if (dbd_prepare == NULL) {
3345            return "RewriteMap types dbd and fastdbd require mod_dbd!";
3346        }
3347        if ((a2[0] == 'd') || (a2[0] == 'D')) {
3348            newmap->type = MAPTYPE_DBD;
3349            fname = a2+4;
3350        }
3351        else {
3352            newmap->type = MAPTYPE_DBD_CACHE;
3353            fname = a2+8;
3354            newmap->cachename = apr_psprintf(cmd->pool, "%pp:%s",
3355                                             (void *)cmd->server, a1);
3356        }
3357        newmap->dbdq = a1;
3358        dbd_prepare(cmd->server, fname, newmap->dbdq);
3359    }
3360    else if (strncasecmp(a2, "prg:", 4) == 0) {
3361        apr_tokenize_to_argv(a2 + 4, &newmap->argv, cmd->pool);
3362
3363        fname = newmap->argv[0];
3364        if ((newmap->argv[0] = ap_server_root_relative(cmd->pool,
3365                                                       fname)) == NULL) {
3366            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteMap: bad path to prg map: ",
3367                               fname, NULL);
3368        }
3369
3370        newmap->type      = MAPTYPE_PRG;
3371        newmap->checkfile = newmap->argv[0];
3372        rewrite_lock_needed = 1;
3373
3374        if (a3) {
3375            char *tok_cntx;
3376            newmap->user = apr_strtok(apr_pstrdup(cmd->pool, a3), ":", &tok_cntx);
3377            newmap->group = apr_strtok(NULL, ":", &tok_cntx);
3378        }
3379    }
3380    else if (strncasecmp(a2, "int:", 4) == 0) {
3381        newmap->type      = MAPTYPE_INT;
3382        newmap->func      = (char *(*)(request_rec *,char *))
3383                            apr_hash_get(mapfunc_hash, a2+4, strlen(a2+4));
3384        if (newmap->func == NULL) {
3385            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteMap: internal map not found:",
3386                               a2+4, NULL);
3387        }
3388    }
3389    else {
3390        if ((fname = ap_server_root_relative(cmd->pool, a2)) == NULL) {
3391            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteMap: bad path to txt map: ",
3392                               a2, NULL);
3393        }
3394
3395        newmap->type      = MAPTYPE_TXT;
3396        newmap->datafile  = fname;
3397        newmap->checkfile = fname;
3398        newmap->cachename = apr_psprintf(cmd->pool, "%pp:%s",
3399                                         (void *)cmd->server, a1);
3400    }
3401
3402    if (newmap->checkfile
3403        && (apr_stat(&st, newmap->checkfile, APR_FINFO_MIN,
3404                     cmd->pool) != APR_SUCCESS)) {
3405        return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool,
3406                           "RewriteMap: file for map ", a1,
3407                           " not found:", newmap->checkfile, NULL);
3408    }
3409
3410    apr_hash_set(sconf->rewritemaps, a1, APR_HASH_KEY_STRING, newmap);
3411
3412    return NULL;
3413}
3414
3415static const char *cmd_rewritebase(cmd_parms *cmd, void *in_dconf,
3416                                   const char *a1)
3417{
3418    rewrite_perdir_conf *dconf = in_dconf;
3419
3420    if (cmd->path == NULL || dconf == NULL) {
3421        return "RewriteBase: only valid in per-directory config files";
3422    }
3423    if (a1[0] == '\0') {
3424        return "RewriteBase: empty URL not allowed";
3425    }
3426    if (a1[0] != '/') {
3427        return "RewriteBase: argument is not a valid URL";
3428    }
3429
3430    dconf->baseurl = a1;
3431    dconf->baseurl_set = 1;
3432
3433    return NULL;
3434}
3435
3436/*
3437 * generic lexer for RewriteRule and RewriteCond flags.
3438 * The parser will be passed in as a function pointer
3439 * and called if a flag was found
3440 */ view japanese
3441static const char *cmd_parseflagfield(apr_pool_t *p, void *cfg, char *key,
3442                                      const char *(*parse)(apr_pool_t *,
3443                                                           void *,
3444                                                           char *, char *))
3445{
3446    char *val, *nextp, *endp;
3447    const char *err;
3448
3449    endp = key + strlen(key) - 1;
3450    if (*key != '[' || *endp != ']') {
3451        return "bad flag delimiters";
3452    }
3453
3454    *endp = ','; /* for simpler parsing */ view japanese
3455    ++key;
3456
3457    while (*key) {
3458        /* skip leading spaces */ view japanese
3459        while (apr_isspace(*key)) {
3460            ++key;
3461        }
3462
3463        if (!*key || (nextp = ap_strchr(key, ',')) == NULL) { /* NULL should not
3464                                                               * happen, but ...
3465                                                               */ view japanese
3466            break;
3467        }
3468
3469        /* strip trailing spaces */ view japanese
3470        endp = nextp - 1;
3471        while (apr_isspace(*endp)) {
3472            --endp;
3473        }
3474        *++endp = '\0';
3475
3476        /* split key and val */ view japanese
3477        val = ap_strchr(key, '=');
3478        if (val) {
3479            *val++ = '\0';
3480        }
3481        else {
3482            val = endp;
3483        }
3484
3485        err = parse(p, cfg, key, val);
3486        if (err) {
3487            return err;
3488        }
3489
3490        key = nextp + 1;
3491    }
3492
3493    return NULL;
3494}
3495
3496static const char *cmd_rewritecond_setflag(apr_pool_t *p, void *_cfg,
3497                                           char *key, char *val)
3498{
3499    rewritecond_entry *cfg = _cfg;
3500
3501    if (   strcasecmp(key, "nocase") == 0
3502        || strcasecmp(key, "NC") == 0    ) {
3503        cfg->flags |= CONDFLAG_NOCASE;
3504    }
3505    else if (   strcasecmp(key, "ornext") == 0
3506             || strcasecmp(key, "OR") == 0    ) {
3507        cfg->flags |= CONDFLAG_ORNEXT;
3508    }
3509    else if (   strcasecmp(key, "novary") == 0
3510             || strcasecmp(key, "NV") == 0    ) {
3511        cfg->flags |= CONDFLAG_NOVARY;
3512    }
3513    else {
3514        return apr_pstrcat(p, "unknown flag '", key, "'", NULL);
3515    }
3516    return NULL;
3517}
3518
3519static const char *cmd_rewritecond(cmd_parms *cmd, void *in_dconf,
3520                                   const char *in_str)
3521{
3522    rewrite_perdir_conf *dconf = in_dconf;
3523    char *str = apr_pstrdup(cmd->pool, in_str);
3524    rewrite_server_conf *sconf;
3525    rewritecond_entry *newcond;
3526    ap_regex_t *regexp;
3527    char *a1 = NULL, *a2 = NULL, *a2_end, *a3 = NULL;
3528    const char *err;
3529
3530    sconf = ap_get_module_config(cmd->server->module_config, &rewrite_module);
3531
3532    /*  make a new entry in the internal temporary rewrite rule list */ view japanese
3533    if (cmd->path == NULL) {   /* is server command */
3534        newcond = apr_array_push(sconf->rewriteconds);
3535    }
3536    else {                     /* is per-directory command */
3537        newcond = apr_array_push(dconf->rewriteconds);
3538    }
3539
3540    /* parse the argument line ourself
3541     * a1 .. a3 are substrings of str, which is a fresh copy
3542     * of the argument line. So we can use a1 .. a3 without
3543     * copying them again.
3544     */ view japanese
3545    if (parseargline(str, &a1, &a2, &a2_end, &a3)) {
3546        return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteCond: bad argument line '", str,
3547                           "'", NULL);
3548    }
3549
3550    /* arg1: the input string */ view japanese
3551    newcond->input = a1;
3552
3553    /* arg3: optional flags field
3554     * (this has to be parsed first, because we need to
3555     *  know if the regex should be compiled with ICASE!)
3556     */ view japanese
3557    newcond->flags = CONDFLAG_NONE;
3558    if (a3 != NULL) {
3559        if ((err = cmd_parseflagfield(cmd->pool, newcond, a3,
3560                                      cmd_rewritecond_setflag)) != NULL) {
3561            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteCond: ", err, NULL);
3562        }
3563    }
3564
3565    /* arg2: the pattern */ view japanese
3566    newcond->pattern = a2;
3567    if (*a2 == '!') {
3568        newcond->flags |= CONDFLAG_NOTMATCH;
3569        ++a2;
3570    }
3571
3572    /* determine the pattern type */ view japanese
3573    newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_REGEX;
3574    if (strcasecmp(a1, "expr") == 0) {
3575        newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_AP_EXPR;
3576    }
3577    else if (*a2 && a2[1]) {
3578        if (*a2 == '-') {
3579            if (!a2[2]) {
3580                switch (a2[1]) {
3581                case 'f': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_FILE_EXISTS; break;
3582                case 's': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_FILE_SIZE;   break;
3583                case 'd': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_FILE_DIR;    break;
3584                case 'x': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_FILE_XBIT;   break;
3585                case 'h': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_FILE_LINK;   break;
3586                case 'L': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_FILE_LINK;   break;
3587                case 'l': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_FILE_LINK;   break;
3588                case 'U': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_LU_URL;      break;
3589                case 'F': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_LU_FILE;     break;
3590                }
3591            }
3592            else if (a2[3]) {
3593                switch (a2[1]) {
3594                case 'l':
3595                    if (a2[2] == 't') {
3596                        a2 += 3;
3597                        newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_INT_LT;
3598                    }
3599                    else if (a2[2] == 'e') {
3600                        a2 += 3;
3601                        newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_INT_LE;
3602                    }
3603                    break;
3604
3605                case 'g':
3606                    if (a2[2] == 't') {
3607                        a2 += 3;
3608                        newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_INT_GT;
3609                    }
3610                    else if (a2[2] == 'e') {
3611                        a2 += 3;
3612                        newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_INT_GE;
3613                    }
3614                    break;
3615
3616                case 'e':
3617                    if (a2[2] == 'q') {
3618                        a2 += 3;
3619                        newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_INT_EQ;
3620                    }
3621                    break;
3622
3623                case 'n':
3624                    if (a2[2] == 'e') {
3625                        /* Inversion, ensure !-ne == -eq */ view japanese
3626                        a2 += 3;
3627                        newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_INT_EQ;
3628                        newcond->flags ^= CONDFLAG_NOTMATCH;
3629                    }
3630                    break;
3631                }
3632            }
3633        }
3634        else {
3635            switch (*a2) {
3636            case '>': if (*++a2 == '=')
3637                          ++a2, newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_STR_GE;
3638                      else
3639                          newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_STR_GT;
3640                      break;
3641
3642            case '<': if (*++a2 == '=')
3643                          ++a2, newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_STR_LE;
3644                      else
3645                          newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_STR_LT;
3646                      break;
3647
3648            case '=': newcond->ptype = CONDPAT_STR_EQ;
3649                      /* "" represents an empty string */ view japanese
3650                      if (*++a2 == '"' && a2[1] == '"' && !a2[2])
3651                          a2 += 2;
3652                      break;
3653            }
3654        }
3655    }
3656
3657    if ((newcond->ptype != CONDPAT_REGEX) &&
3658        (newcond->ptype < CONDPAT_STR_LT || newcond->ptype > CONDPAT_STR_GE) &&
3659        (newcond->flags & CONDFLAG_NOCASE)) {
3660        ap_log_error(APLOG_MARK, APLOG_WARNING, 0, cmd->server, APLOGNO(00665)
3661                     "RewriteCond: NoCase option for non-regex pattern '%s' "
3662                     "is not supported and will be ignored. (%s:%d)", a2,
3663                     cmd->directive->filename, cmd->directive->line_num);
3664        newcond->flags &= ~CONDFLAG_NOCASE;
3665    }
3666
3667    newcond->pskip = a2 - newcond->pattern;
3668    newcond->pattern += newcond->pskip;
3669
3670    if (newcond->ptype == CONDPAT_REGEX) {
3671        regexp = ap_pregcomp(cmd->pool, a2,
3672                             AP_REG_EXTENDED | ((newcond->flags & CONDFLAG_NOCASE)
3673                                             ? AP_REG_ICASE : 0));
3674        if (!regexp) {
3675            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteCond: cannot compile regular "
3676                               "expression '", a2, "'", NULL);
3677        }
3678
3679        newcond->regexp  = regexp;
3680    }
3681    else if (newcond->ptype == CONDPAT_AP_EXPR) {
3682        int in_htaccess = cmd->pool == cmd->temp_pool;
3683        unsigned int flags = newcond->flags & CONDFLAG_NOVARY ?
3684                             AP_EXPR_FLAG_DONT_VARY : 0;
3685        /* Use restricted ap_expr() parser in htaccess context. */ view japanese
3686        if (in_htaccess) flags |= AP_EXPR_FLAG_RESTRICTED;
3687        newcond->expr = ap_expr_parse_cmd(cmd, a2, flags, &err, NULL);
3688        if (err)
3689            return apr_psprintf(cmd->pool, "RewriteCond: cannot compile "
3690                                "expression%s \"%s\" %s",
3691                                in_htaccess ? " in htaccess context" : "",
3692                                a2, err);
3693    }
3694
3695    return NULL;
3696}
3697
3698static const char *cmd_rewriterule_setflag(apr_pool_t *p, void *_cfg,
3699                                           char *key, char *val)
3700{
3701    rewriterule_entry *cfg = _cfg;
3702    int error = 0;
3703
3704    switch (*key++) {
3705    case 'b':
3706    case 'B':
3707        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "ackrefescaping")) {
3708            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_ESCAPEBACKREF;
3709            if (val && *val) {
3710                cfg->escapes = val;
3711            }
3712        }
3713        else if (!strcasecmp(key, "NE")) {
3714            if (val && *val) {
3715                cfg->noescapes = val;
3716            }
3717            else {
3718                return "flag 'BNE' wants a list of characters (i.e. [BNE=...])";
3719            }
3720        }
3721        else if (!strcasecmp(key, "NP") || !strcasecmp(key, "ackrefernoplus")) { 
3722            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_ESCAPENOPLUS;
3723        }
3724        else if (!strcasecmp(key, "CTLS")) {
3725            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_ESCAPECTLS|RULEFLAG_ESCAPEBACKREF;
3726        }
3727        else {
3728            ++error;
3729        }
3730        break;
3731    case 'c':
3732    case 'C':
3733        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "hain")) {           /* chain */ view japanese
3734            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_CHAIN;
3735        }
3736        else if (((*key == 'O' || *key == 'o') && !key[1])
3737                 || !strcasecmp(key, "ookie")) {           /* cookie */ view japanese
3738            data_item *cp = cfg->cookie;
3739
3740            if (!cp) {
3741                cp = cfg->cookie = apr_palloc(p, sizeof(*cp));
3742            }
3743            else {
3744                while (cp->next) {
3745                    cp = cp->next;
3746                }
3747                cp->next = apr_palloc(p, sizeof(*cp));
3748                cp = cp->next;
3749            }
3750
3751            cp->next = NULL;
3752            cp->data = val;
3753        }
3754        else {
3755            ++error;
3756        }
3757        break;
3758    case 'd':
3759    case 'D':
3760        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "PI") || !strcasecmp(key,"iscardpath")) {
3761            cfg->flags |= (RULEFLAG_DISCARDPATHINFO);
3762        }
3763        break;
3764    case 'e':
3765    case 'E':
3766        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "nv")) {             /* env */ view japanese
3767            data_item *cp = cfg->env;
3768
3769            if (!cp) {
3770                cp = cfg->env = apr_palloc(p, sizeof(*cp));
3771            }
3772            else {
3773                while (cp->next) {
3774                    cp = cp->next;
3775                }
3776                cp->next = apr_palloc(p, sizeof(*cp));
3777                cp = cp->next;
3778            }
3779
3780            cp->next = NULL;
3781            cp->data = val;
3782        }
3783        else if (!strcasecmp(key, "nd")) {                /* end */ view japanese
3784            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_END;
3785        }
3786        else {
3787            ++error;
3788        }
3789        break;
3790
3791    case 'f':
3792    case 'F':
3793        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "orbidden")) {       /* forbidden */ view japanese
3794            cfg->flags |= (RULEFLAG_STATUS | RULEFLAG_NOSUB);
3795            cfg->forced_responsecode = HTTP_FORBIDDEN;
3796        }
3797        else {
3798            ++error;
3799        }
3800        break;
3801
3802    case 'g':
3803    case 'G':
3804        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "one")) {            /* gone */ view japanese
3805            cfg->flags |= (RULEFLAG_STATUS | RULEFLAG_NOSUB);
3806            cfg->forced_responsecode = HTTP_GONE;
3807        }
3808        else {
3809            ++error;
3810        }
3811        break;
3812
3813    case 'h':
3814    case 'H':
3815        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "andler")) {         /* handler */
3816            cfg->forced_handler = val;
3817        }
3818        else {
3819            ++error;
3820        }
3821        break;
3822    case 'l':
3823    case 'L':
3824        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "ast")) {            /* last */ view japanese
3825            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_LASTRULE;
3826        }
3827        else {
3828            ++error;
3829        }
3830        break;
3831
3832    case 'n':
3833    case 'N':
3834        if (((*key == 'E' || *key == 'e') && !key[1])
3835            || !strcasecmp(key, "oescape")) {              /* noescape */ view japanese
3836            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_NOESCAPE;
3837        }
3838        else if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "ext")) {       /* next */ view japanese
3839            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_NEWROUND;
3840            if (val && *val) { 
3841                cfg->maxrounds = atoi(val);
3842            }
3843
3844        }
3845        else if (((*key == 'S' || *key == 's') && !key[1])
3846            || !strcasecmp(key, "osubreq")) {              /* nosubreq */ view japanese
3847            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_IGNOREONSUBREQ;
3848        }
3849        else if (((*key == 'C' || *key == 'c') && !key[1])
3850            || !strcasecmp(key, "ocase")) {                /* nocase */ view japanese
3851            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_NOCASE;
3852        }
3853        else {
3854            ++error;
3855        }
3856        break;
3857
3858    case 'p':
3859    case 'P':
3860        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "roxy")) {           /* proxy */ view japanese
3861            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_PROXY;
3862        }
3863        else if (((*key == 'T' || *key == 't') && !key[1])
3864            || !strcasecmp(key, "assthrough")) {           /* passthrough */ view japanese
3865            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_PASSTHROUGH;
3866        }
3867        else {
3868            ++error;
3869        }
3870        break;
3871
3872    case 'q':
3873    case 'Q':
3874        if (   !strcasecmp(key, "SA")
3875            || !strcasecmp(key, "sappend")) {              /* qsappend */ view japanese
3876            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_QSAPPEND;
3877        } else if ( !strcasecmp(key, "SD")
3878                || !strcasecmp(key, "sdiscard") ) {       /* qsdiscard */ view japanese
3879            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_QSDISCARD;
3880        } else if ( !strcasecmp(key, "SL")
3881                || !strcasecmp(key, "slast") ) {          /* qslast */ view japanese
3882            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_QSLAST;
3883        }
3884        else {
3885            ++error;
3886        }
3887        break;
3888
3889    case 'r':
3890    case 'R':
3891        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "edirect")) {        /* redirect */ view japanese
3892            int status = 0;
3893
3894            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_FORCEREDIRECT;
3895            if (*val) {
3896                if (strcasecmp(val, "permanent") == 0) {
3897                    status = HTTP_MOVED_PERMANENTLY;
3898                }
3899                else if (strcasecmp(val, "temp") == 0) {
3900                    status = HTTP_MOVED_TEMPORARILY;
3901                }
3902                else if (strcasecmp(val, "seeother") == 0) {
3903                    status = HTTP_SEE_OTHER;
3904                }
3905                else if (apr_isdigit(*val)) {
3906                    status = atoi(val);
3907                    if (status != HTTP_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR) {
3908                        int idx =
3909                            ap_index_of_response(HTTP_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR);
3910
3911                        if (ap_index_of_response(status) == idx) {
3912                            return apr_psprintf(p, "invalid HTTP "
3913                                                   "response code '%s' for "
3914                                                   "flag 'R'",
3915                                                val);
3916                        }
3917                    }
3918                    if (!ap_is_HTTP_REDIRECT(status)) {
3919                        cfg->flags |= (RULEFLAG_STATUS | RULEFLAG_NOSUB);
3920                    }
3921                }
3922                cfg->forced_responsecode = status;
3923            }
3924        }
3925        else {
3926            ++error;
3927        }
3928        break;
3929
3930    case 's':
3931    case 'S':
3932        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "kip")) {            /* skip */ view japanese
3933            cfg->skip = atoi(val);
3934        }
3935        else {
3936            ++error;
3937        }
3938        break;
3939
3940    case 't':
3941    case 'T':
3942        if (!*key || !strcasecmp(key, "ype")) {            /* type */
3943            cfg->forced_mimetype = val;
3944        }
3945        else {
3946            ++error;
3947        }
3948        break;
3949    case 'u':
3950    case 'U':
3951        if (!strcasecmp(key, "nsafePrefixStat")){
3952            cfg->flags |= (RULEFLAG_UNSAFE_PREFIX_STAT);
3953        }
3954        else if(!strcasecmp(key, "nsafeAllow3F")) {
3955            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_UNSAFE_ALLOW3F;
3956        }
3957        else if(!strcasecmp(key, "NC")) {
3958            cfg->flags |= RULEFLAG_UNC;
3959        }
3960        else {
3961            ++error;
3962        }
3963        break;
3964    default:
3965        ++error;
3966        break;
3967    }
3968
3969    if (error) {
3970        return apr_pstrcat(p, "unknown flag '", --key, "'", NULL);
3971    }
3972
3973    return NULL;
3974}
3975
3976static const char *cmd_rewriterule(cmd_parms *cmd, void *in_dconf,
3977                                   const char *in_str)
3978{
3979    rewrite_perdir_conf *dconf = in_dconf;
3980    char *str = apr_pstrdup(cmd->pool, in_str);
3981    rewrite_server_conf *sconf;
3982    rewriterule_entry *newrule;
3983    ap_regex_t *regexp;
3984    char *a1 = NULL, *a2 = NULL, *a2_end, *a3 = NULL;
3985    const char *err;
3986
3987    sconf = ap_get_module_config(cmd->server->module_config, &rewrite_module);
3988
3989    /*  make a new entry in the internal rewrite rule list */ view japanese
3990    if (cmd->path == NULL) {   /* is server command */
3991        newrule = apr_array_push(sconf->rewriterules);
3992    }
3993    else {                     /* is per-directory command */
3994        newrule = apr_array_push(dconf->rewriterules);
3995    }
3996
3997    /*  parse the argument line ourself */ view japanese
3998    if (parseargline(str, &a1, &a2, &a2_end, &a3)) {
3999        return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteRule: bad argument line '", str,
4000                           "'", NULL);
4001    }
4002
4003    newrule->forced_mimetype     = NULL;
4004    newrule->forced_handler      = NULL;
4005    newrule->forced_responsecode = HTTP_MOVED_TEMPORARILY;
4006    newrule->flags  = RULEFLAG_NONE;
4007    newrule->env = NULL;
4008    newrule->cookie = NULL;
4009    newrule->skip   = 0;
4010    newrule->maxrounds = REWRITE_MAX_ROUNDS;
4011    newrule->escapes = newrule->noescapes = NULL;
4012
4013    /* arg3: optional flags field */ view japanese
4014    if (a3 != NULL) {
4015        if ((err = cmd_parseflagfield(cmd->pool, newrule, a3,
4016                                      cmd_rewriterule_setflag)) != NULL) {
4017            return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool, "RewriteRule: ", err, NULL);
4018        }
4019    }
4020
4021    /* arg1: the pattern
4022     * try to compile the regexp to test if is ok
4023     */ view japanese
4024    if (*a1 == '!') {
4025        newrule->flags |= RULEFLAG_NOTMATCH;
4026        ++a1;
4027    }
4028
4029    regexp = ap_pregcomp(cmd->pool, a1, AP_REG_EXTENDED |
4030                                        ((newrule->flags & RULEFLAG_NOCASE)
4031                                         ? AP_REG_ICASE : 0));
4032    if (!regexp) {
4033        return apr_pstrcat(cmd->pool,
4034                           "RewriteRule: cannot compile regular expression '",
4035                           a1, "'", NULL);
4036    }
4037
4038    newrule->pattern = a1;
4039    newrule->regexp  = regexp;
4040
4041    /* arg2: the output string */ view japanese
4042    newrule->output = a2;
4043    if (*a2 == '-' && !a2[1]) {
4044        newrule->flags |= RULEFLAG_NOSUB;
4045    }
4046
4047    if (*(a2_end-1) == '?') {
4048        /* a literal ? at the end of the unsubstituted rewrite rule */ view japanese
4049        if (newrule->flags & RULEFLAG_QSAPPEND) {
4050           /* with QSA, splitout_queryargs will safely handle it if RULEFLAG_QSLAST is set */ view japanese
4051           newrule->flags |= RULEFLAG_QSLAST;
4052        }
4053        else {
4054            /* avoid getting a query string via inadvertent capture */ view japanese
4055            newrule->flags |= RULEFLAG_QSNONE;
4056            /* trailing ? has done its job, but splitout_queryargs will not chop it off */ view japanese
4057            *(a2_end-1) = '\0';
4058       }
4059    }
4060    else if (newrule->flags & RULEFLAG_QSDISCARD) {
4061        if (NULL == ap_strchr(newrule->output, '?')) {
4062            newrule->flags |= RULEFLAG_QSNONE;
4063        }
4064    }
4065
4066    /* now, if the server or per-dir config holds an
4067     * array of RewriteCond entries, we take it for us
4068     * and clear the array
4069     */ view japanese
4070    if (cmd->path == NULL) {  /* is server command */ view japanese
4071        newrule->rewriteconds   = sconf->rewriteconds;
4072        sconf->rewriteconds = apr_array_make(cmd->pool, 2,
4073                                             sizeof(rewritecond_entry));
4074    }
4075    else {                    /* is per-directory command */ view japanese
4076        newrule->rewriteconds   = dconf->rewriteconds;
4077        dconf->rewriteconds = apr_array_make(cmd->pool, 2,
4078                                             sizeof(rewritecond_entry));
4079    }
4080
4081    return NULL;
4082}
4083
4084
4085/*
4086 * +-------------------------------------------------------+
4087 * |                                                       |
4088 * |                  the rewriting engine
4089 * |                                                       |
4090 * +-------------------------------------------------------+
4091 */ view japanese
4092
4093/* Lexicographic Compare */ view japanese
4094static APR_INLINE int compare_lexicography(char *a, char *b)
4095{
4096    apr_size_t i, lena, lenb;
4097
4098    lena = strlen(a);
4099    lenb = strlen(b);
4100
4101    if (lena == lenb) {
4102        for (i = 0; i < lena; ++i) {
4103            if (a[i] != b[i]) {
4104                return ((unsigned char)a[i] > (unsigned char)b[i]) ? 1 : -1;
4105            }
4106        }
4107
4108        return 0;
4109    }
4110
4111    return ((lena > lenb) ? 1 : -1);
4112}
4113
4114/*
4115 * Apply a single rewriteCond
4116 */ view japanese
4117static cond_return_type apply_rewrite_cond(rewritecond_entry *p, rewrite_ctx *ctx)
4118{
4119    char *input = NULL;
4120    apr_finfo_t sb;
4121    request_rec *rsub, *r = ctx->r;
4122    ap_regmatch_t regmatch[AP_MAX_REG_MATCH];
4123    int rc = COND_RC_NOMATCH;
4124    int basis;
4125
4126    if (p->ptype != CONDPAT_AP_EXPR)
4127        input = do_expand(p->input, ctx, NULL, NULL);
4128
4129    switch (p->ptype) {
4130    case CONDPAT_FILE_EXISTS:
4131        if (APR_SUCCESS != ap_stat_check(input, r->pool)) {
4132            r->status = HTTP_FORBIDDEN;
4133            rewritelog(r, 4, ctx->perdir, "RewriteCond: refusing to stat input='%s'", input);
4134            return COND_RC_STATUS_SET;
4135        }
4136        if (   apr_stat(&sb, input, APR_FINFO_MIN, r->pool) == APR_SUCCESS
4137            && sb.filetype == APR_REG) {
4138            rc = COND_RC_MATCH;
4139        }
4140        break;
4141
4142    case CONDPAT_FILE_SIZE:
4143        if (APR_SUCCESS != ap_stat_check(input, r->pool)) {
4144            r->status = HTTP_FORBIDDEN;
4145            rewritelog(r, 4, ctx->perdir, "RewriteCond: refusing to stat input='%s'", input);
4146            return COND_RC_STATUS_SET;
4147        }
4148        if (   apr_stat(&sb, input, APR_FINFO_MIN, r->pool) == APR_SUCCESS
4149            && sb.filetype == APR_REG && sb.size > 0) {
4150            rc = COND_RC_MATCH;
4151        }
4152        break;
4153
4154    case CONDPAT_FILE_LINK:
4155        if (APR_SUCCESS != ap_stat_check(input, r->pool)) {
4156            r->status = HTTP_FORBIDDEN;
4157            rewritelog(r, 4, ctx->perdir, "RewriteCond: refusing to stat input='%s'", input);
4158            return COND_RC_STATUS_SET;
4159        }
4160#if !defined(OS2)
4161        if (   apr_stat(&sb, input, APR_FINFO_MIN | APR_FINFO_LINK,
4162                        r->pool) == APR_SUCCESS
4163            && sb.filetype == APR_LNK) {
4164            rc = COND_RC_MATCH;
4165        }
4166#endif
4167        break;
4168
4169    case CONDPAT_FILE_DIR:
4170        if (APR_SUCCESS != ap_stat_check(input, r->pool)) {
4171            r->status = HTTP_FORBIDDEN;
4172            rewritelog(r, 4, ctx->perdir, "RewriteCond: refusing to stat input='%s'", input);
4173            return COND_RC_STATUS_SET;
4174        }
4175        if (   apr_stat(&sb, input, APR_FINFO_MIN, r->pool) == APR_SUCCESS
4176            && sb.filetype == APR_DIR) {
4177            rc = COND_RC_MATCH;
4178        }
4179        break;
4180
4181    case CONDPAT_FILE_XBIT:
4182        if (APR_SUCCESS != ap_stat_check(input, r->pool)) {
4183            r->status = HTTP_FORBIDDEN;
4184            rewritelog(r, 4, ctx->perdir, "RewriteCond: refusing to stat input='%s'", input);
4185            return COND_RC_STATUS_SET;
4186        }
4187        if (   apr_stat(&sb, input, APR_FINFO_PROT, r->pool) == APR_SUCCESS
4188            && (sb.protection & (APR_UEXECUTE | APR_GEXECUTE | APR_WEXECUTE))) {
4189            rc = COND_RC_MATCH;
4190        }
4191        break;
4192
4193    case CONDPAT_LU_URL:
4194        if (*input && subreq_ok(r)) {
4195            rsub = ap_sub_req_lookup_uri(input, r, NULL);
4196            if (rsub->status < 400) {
4197                rc = COND_RC_MATCH;
4198            }
4199            rewritelog(r, 5, NULL, "RewriteCond URI (-U check: "
4200                        "path=%s -> status=%d", input, rsub->status);
4201            ap_destroy_sub_req(rsub);
4202        }
4203        break;
4204
4205    case CONDPAT_LU_FILE:
4206        if (*input && subreq_ok(r)) {
4207            if (APR_SUCCESS != ap_stat_check(input, r->pool)) {
4208                r->status = HTTP_FORBIDDEN;
4209                rewritelog(r, 4, ctx->perdir, "RewriteCond: refusing to stat input='%s'", input);
4210                return COND_RC_STATUS_SET;
4211            }
4212            rsub = ap_sub_req_lookup_file(input, r, NULL);
4213            if (rsub->status < 300 &&
4214                /* double-check that file exists since default result is 200 */ view japanese
4215                apr_stat(&sb, rsub->filename, APR_FINFO_MIN,
4216                         r->pool) == APR_SUCCESS) {
4217                rc = COND_RC_MATCH;
4218            }
4219            rewritelog(r, 5, NULL, "RewriteCond file (-F check: path=%s "
4220                        "-> file=%s status=%d", input, rsub->filename,
4221                        rsub->status);
4222            ap_destroy_sub_req(rsub);
4223        }
4224        break;
4225
4226    case CONDPAT_STR_GE:
4227        basis = 0;
4228        goto test_str_g;
4229    case CONDPAT_STR_GT:
4230        basis = 1;
4231test_str_g:
4232        if (p->flags & CONDFLAG_NOCASE) {
4233            rc = (strcasecmp(input, p->pattern) >= basis) ? COND_RC_MATCH : COND_RC_NOMATCH;
4234        }
4235        else {
4236            rc = (compare_lexicography(input, p->pattern) >= basis) ? COND_RC_MATCH : COND_RC_NOMATCH;
4237        }
4238        break;
4239
4240    case CONDPAT_STR_LE:
4241        basis = 0;
4242        goto test_str_l;
4243    case CONDPAT_STR_LT:
4244        basis = -1;
4245test_str_l:
4246        if (p->flags & CONDFLAG_NOCASE) {
4247            rc = (strcasecmp(input, p->pattern) <= basis) ? COND_RC_MATCH : COND_RC_NOMATCH;
4248        }
4249        else {
4250            rc = (compare_lexicography(input, p->pattern) <= basis) ? COND_RC_MATCH : COND_RC_NOMATCH;
4251        }
4252        break;
4253
4254    case CONDPAT_STR_EQ:
4255        /* Note: the only type where the operator is dropped from p->pattern */ view japanese
4256        if (p->flags & CONDFLAG_NOCASE) {
4257            rc = !strcasecmp(input, p->pattern);
4258        }
4259        else {
4260            rc = !strcmp(input, p->pattern);
4261        }
4262        break;
4263
4264    case CONDPAT_INT_GE: rc = (atoi(input) >= atoi(p->pattern)); break;
4265    case CONDPAT_INT_GT: rc = (atoi(input) > atoi(p->pattern));  break;
4266
4267    case CONDPAT_INT_LE: rc = (atoi(input) <= atoi(p->pattern)); break;
4268    case CONDPAT_INT_LT: rc = (atoi(input) < atoi(p->pattern));  break;
4269
4270    case CONDPAT_INT_EQ: rc = (atoi(input) == atoi(p->pattern)); break;
4271
4272    case CONDPAT_AP_EXPR:
4273        {
4274            const char *err, *source;
4275            rc = ap_expr_exec_re(r, p->expr, AP_MAX_REG_MATCH, regmatch,
4276                                 &source, &err);
4277            if (rc < 0 || err) {
4278                rewritelog(r, 1, ctx->perdir,
4279                            "RewriteCond: expr='%s' evaluation failed: %s",
4280                            p->pattern - p->pskip, err);
4281                rc = COND_RC_NOMATCH;
4282            }
4283            else {
4284                rc = (rc > 0) ? COND_RC_MATCH : COND_RC_NOMATCH;
4285            }
4286
4287            /* update briRC backref info */
4288            if (rc && !(p->flags & CONDFLAG_NOTMATCH)) {
4289                ctx->briRC.source = source;
4290                memcpy(ctx->briRC.regmatch, regmatch, sizeof(regmatch));
4291            }
4292        }
4293        break;
4294    default:
4295        /* it is really a regexp pattern, so apply it */ view japanese
4296        rc = !ap_regexec(p->regexp, input, AP_MAX_REG_MATCH, regmatch, 0);
4297
4298        /* update briRC backref info */ view japanese
4299        if (rc && !(p->flags & CONDFLAG_NOTMATCH)) {
4300            ctx->briRC.source = input;
4301            memcpy(ctx->briRC.regmatch, regmatch, sizeof(regmatch));
4302        }
4303        break;
4304    }
4305
4306    if (p->flags & CONDFLAG_NOTMATCH && rc <= COND_RC_MATCH) {
4307        rc = !rc;
4308    }
4309
4310    rewritelog(r, 4, ctx->perdir, "RewriteCond: input='%s' pattern='%s'%s "
4311               "=> %s", input, p->pattern - p->pskip,
4312               (p->flags & CONDFLAG_NOCASE) ? " [NC]" : "",
4313               rc ? "matched" : "not-matched");
4314
4315    return rc;
4316}
4317
4318/* check for forced type and handler */ view japanese
4319static APR_INLINE void force_type_handler(rewriterule_entry *p,
4320                                          rewrite_ctx *ctx)
4321{
4322    char *expanded;
4323
4324    if (p->forced_mimetype) {
4325        expanded = do_expand(p->forced_mimetype, ctx, p, NULL);
4326
4327        if (*expanded) {
4328            ap_str_tolower(expanded);
4329
4330            rewritelog(ctx->r, 2, ctx->perdir, "remember %s to have MIME-type "
4331                        "'%s'", ctx->r->filename, expanded);
4332
4333            apr_table_setn(ctx->r->notes, REWRITE_FORCED_MIMETYPE_NOTEVAR,
4334                           expanded);
4335        }
4336    }
4337
4338    if (p->forced_handler) {
4339        expanded = do_expand(p->forced_handler, ctx, p, NULL);
4340
4341        if (*expanded) {
4342            ap_str_tolower(expanded);
4343
4344            rewritelog(ctx->r, 2, ctx->perdir, "remember %s to have "
4345                        "Content-handler '%s'", ctx->r->filename, expanded);
4346
4347            apr_table_setn(ctx->r->notes, REWRITE_FORCED_HANDLER_NOTEVAR,
4348                           expanded);
4349        }
4350    }
4351}
4352
4353/*
4354 * Apply a single RewriteRule
4355 */ view japanese
4356static rule_return_type apply_rewrite_rule(rewriterule_entry *p,
4357                                           rewrite_ctx *ctx)
4358{
4359    ap_regmatch_t regmatch[AP_MAX_REG_MATCH];
4360    apr_array_header_t *rewriteconds;
4361    rewritecond_entry *conds;
4362    int i, rc;
4363    char *newuri = NULL;
4364    request_rec *r = ctx->r;
4365    int is_proxyreq = 0;
4366    int prefix_added = 0;
4367
4368    ctx->uri = r->filename;
4369
4370    if (ctx->perdir) {
4371        apr_size_t dirlen = strlen(ctx->perdir);
4372
4373        /*
4374         * Proxy request?
4375         */ view japanese
4376        is_proxyreq = (   r->proxyreq && r->filename
4377                       && !strncmp(r->filename, "proxy:", 6));
4378
4379        /* Since we want to match against the (so called) full URL, we have
4380         * to re-add the PATH_INFO postfix
4381         */ view japanese
4382        if (r->path_info && *r->path_info) {
4383            rewritelog(r, 3, ctx->perdir, "add path info postfix: %s -> %s%s",
4384                       ctx->uri, ctx->uri, r->path_info);
4385            ctx->uri = apr_pstrcat(r->pool, ctx->uri, r->path_info, NULL);
4386        }
4387
4388        /* Additionally we strip the physical path from the url to match
4389         * it independent from the underlying filesystem.
4390         */ view japanese
4391        if (!is_proxyreq && strlen(ctx->uri) >= dirlen &&
4392            !strncmp(ctx->uri, ctx->perdir, dirlen)) {
4393
4394            rewritelog(r, 3, ctx->perdir, "strip per-dir prefix: %s -> %s",
4395                       ctx->uri, ctx->uri + dirlen);
4396            ctx->uri = ctx->uri + dirlen;
4397        }
4398    }
4399
4400    /* Try to match the URI against the RewriteRule pattern
4401     * and exit immediately if it didn't apply.
4402     */ view japanese
4403    rewritelog(r, 3, ctx->perdir, "applying pattern '%s' to uri '%s'",
4404                p->pattern, ctx->uri);
4405
4406    rc = !ap_regexec(p->regexp, ctx->uri, AP_MAX_REG_MATCH, regmatch, 0);
4407    if (! (( rc && !(p->flags & RULEFLAG_NOTMATCH)) ||
4408           (!rc &&  (p->flags & RULEFLAG_NOTMATCH))   ) ) {
4409        return RULE_RC_NOMATCH;
4410    }
4411
4412    /* It matched, wow! Now it's time to prepare the context structure for
4413     * further processing
4414     */ view japanese
4415    ctx->vary_this = NULL;
4416    ctx->briRC.source = NULL;
4417
4418    if (p->flags & RULEFLAG_NOTMATCH) {
4419        ctx->briRR.source = NULL;
4420    }
4421    else {
4422        ctx->briRR.source = apr_pstrdup(r->pool, ctx->uri);
4423        memcpy(ctx->briRR.regmatch, regmatch, sizeof(regmatch));
4424    }
4425
4426    /* Ok, we already know the pattern has matched, but we now
4427     * additionally have to check for all existing preconditions
4428     * (RewriteCond) which have to be also true. We do this at
4429     * this very late stage to avoid unnecessary checks which
4430     * would slow down the rewriting engine.
4431     */ view japanese
4432    rewriteconds = p->rewriteconds;
4433    conds = (rewritecond_entry *)rewriteconds->elts;
4434
4435    for (i = 0; i < rewriteconds->nelts; ++i) {
4436        rewritecond_entry *c = &conds[i];
4437
4438        rc = apply_rewrite_cond(c, ctx);
4439
4440        /* Error while evaluating cond, r->status set */ view japanese
4441        if (COND_RC_STATUS_SET == rc) {
4442            return RULE_RC_STATUS_SET;
4443        }
4444
4445        /*
4446         * Reset vary_this if the novary flag is set for this condition.
4447         */ view japanese
4448        if (c->flags & CONDFLAG_NOVARY) {
4449            ctx->vary_this = NULL;
4450        }
4451        if (c->flags & CONDFLAG_ORNEXT) {
4452            if (!rc) {
4453                /* One condition is false, but another can be still true. */ view japanese
